_note: Knobs the optimizer (optimize.py / scheduled agent) tunes from accumulated data. The service reads this file live (no restart). Edit via optimization, not by hand.

zones._note: Non-overlapping zone rendering. merge keeps the higher-TF / higher-grade zone when two of the same kind overlap; max_per_side caps how many demand/supply zones are drawn (nearest-first).

partial._note: Validated partial-exit ladder (backtest 10-agent fan-out, 2026-06-29): HTF zone + room>=2R + bank 1/3 at 0.5R -> move stop to break-even -> runner to 2R gives ~70% NET win-rate, PF 1.92, expR +0.276 (OOS-stable). tp1_R is the scale-out level in R. Delete this key to revert to plain 2R.

selectivity._note: Gate for the BUY_NOW/SELL_NOW verdict — the validated ~76% operating point (10-agent matrix 2026-06-29). Only HTF (OB-1h/FL-1h) with-trend zones with >=room_min R of clear room AND a CONFIDENT behavioural-model agreement (|p_up-0.5|>=model_tau in the zone's direction) fire an actionable signal. This lifted net-win 70->76%, expR +0.27->+0.53, PF 1.9->3.2 (OOS-stable). Set require_model_agree=false to relax back to the no-model gate.

stops._note: SL geometry, learned per source/symbol by optimize.run() from MFE/MAE of resolved setups. buf_atr = breathing room beyond the zone (xATR); min_atr = floor stop distance (xATR). disabled_sources are auto-muted when their stop-rate stays high with negative expR. Delete this key to revert to hardcoded buf=0.3 / minStop.

projection_model._note: idea-2 per-TF logistic (re-weighted direction + honest abstention). Fit by backtest/fit_projection_model.py, validated out-of-time by backtest/walkforward_idea2.py (overall 0.485->0.511 full-cov; gate ~0.535 @ 38% coverage). Remove this key to revert project() to the legacy hand-tuned score.

swing_model._note: per-TF swing-reach (ATR units): median forward reach up/dn + turn-bar fraction over H=48. Drives the projection arc amplitude + peak so the counter-swing is drawn at its REAL ~3 ATR size (legacy draw was a fixed 0.42 ATR, ~7x too small). Fit + leave-symbols-out validated by backtest/fit_swing_model.py (conditioning on features did not beat the median, so constants ship). Remove this key to revert the draw to 0.42*ATR.

swing_trade._note: VALIDATED projection-trade geometry per TF — out-of-time (70/30 time-split) test + leave-symbols-out, from the swing-winrate-search workflow (47 agents, 2026-06-29). TP=tp_mult*favourable-reach ATR, SL=sl_mult*adverse-reach ATR; with_trend gates the win-rate badge to HTF-aligned setups. Drives the projection's reach TARGET + likely-reversal display and the honest win-rate badge. M5 lifts win-rate 0.497->0.717 (with-trend, high-conviction, ~half the call frequency). M15/H1 KEEP baseline: no robust config raised win-rate without gutting coverage. Harness: backtest/swing_trade_eval.py. Remove a TF block to hide its target/badge.
